name: Salmon Corn Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1/2 medium Green Bell Pepper, diced fine
1/2 medium Red Bell Pepper, diced fine
1 can Salmon, drained, bone and skin removed. Grilled left over salmon works well in this recipe.
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon in a sauté pan until crisp. Remove from drippings and drain on paper towels.
2. Reserve 2 tablespoons of drippings. Sauté onion, peppers, and celery on medium-low heat until softened.
3. Add seasonings to the vegetables and mix through to coat.
4. Transfer the vegetable mixture to a 4-quart saucepan.
5. Add cream style corn, potato soup, Half and Half, and milk. Rinse with additional liquid if needed.
6. Mix in the boned, skinless, drained canned or grilled salmon.
7. Cook on medium heat for 30-40 minutes. Serve with warm bread.
